name: Scene 01 - Arrival Drill
description: A small group establishes the daily routine, the shared objective, and the first practical conflict.

name: Scene 02 - Office Ledger
description: Two planners compare records while a third person redirects the conversation toward an urgent decision.

name: Scene 03 - Faculty Debate
description: A policy disagreement turns into a public test of alliances, timing, and authority.

name: Scene 04 - Courtyard Plan
description: A private plan is rehearsed in fragments as unexpected witnesses reshape the stakes.

name: Scene 05 - Notice Board
description: An announcement scene that requires precise entrances, overlapping reactions, and fast handoffs.

name: Scene 06 - Private Bargain
description: A quiet negotiation changes direction twice and sets up the next group confrontation.

name: Scene 07 - Committee Hearing
description: Five characters hold a formal meeting where each interruption has a specific cue and response.

name: Scene 08 - Interrupted Lesson
description: A lesson structure breaks down into overlapping questions, corrections, and shifting focus.

name: Scene 09 - Full Company Shift
description: The full ensemble resets the space, tracks shared discoveries, and lands the midpoint reversal.

name: Scene 10 - Final Reckoning
description: The closing sequence gathers the main conflicts into a fast series of reveals, reversals, and exits.
